description: JSON schemas for TM (Subsystem Tool Maker) message types. TM is subsystem-scoped like SPM. Identity: tm_{subsystem} e.g. tm_vm_lifecycle. One TM per subsystem.

common_fields.note: Every inbox message includes these fields
common_fields.message_type: string — see type list in CLAUDE.md
common_fields.message_id: string — unique ID following CLAUDE.md convention

tool_delivery.description: TM confirms a requested tool is built, tested, and ready for use. Written to tm_{subsystem}_to_spm_{subsystem}.json. Notification sent to spm_{subsystem}_inbox.json. If cross_subsystem_candidate was true on the request, notification also sent to mtm_inbox.json. Type code: TDL.

type_specific_fields.in_response_to: string — TRQ message_id of the tool_request this fulfils
type_specific_fields.tool_name: string — final name of the tool as delivered
type_specific_fields.tool_path: string — file path to the tool relative to repo root
type_specific_fields.usage: string — how to invoke it. Enough detail that a coder can use it without asking.
type_specific_fields.test_coverage: string — brief description of how the tool was tested
type_specific_fields.doc_path: string — file path to tool documentation, or empty string if inline
type_specific_fields.cross_subsystem_candidate: boolean — copied from the original tool_request
type_specific_fields.unblocks_tasks: array of strings — task_ids that were blocked waiting for this tool

tool_update.description: TM delivers an update to an existing tool. Written to tm_{subsystem}_to_spm_{subsystem}.json. Type code: TUP — distinct from TDL which is for initial delivery.

type_specific_fields.in_response_to: string — TDL message_id of the original delivery being updated, or TRQ message_id if this update was explicitly requested
type_specific_fields.breaking_changes: boolean — true if existing coder usage must be updated
type_specific_fields.migration_notes: string — how to migrate if breaking_changes is true, or empty string

status_report.description: TM sends daily status to PPM in response to status_report_request. Type code: SRP.

type_specific_fields.tools_built: integer — total tools in the subsystem registry
type_specific_fields.open_requests: integer — pending tool_requests not yet fulfilled
type_specific_fields.active_builds: array of strings — tool names currently being built
type_specific_fields.blocked_requests: array of strings — tool names blocked e.g. waiting on dependency
type_specific_fields.cross_subsystem_candidates_flagged: array of strings — tool names flagged for MTM review this cycle
type_specific_fields.issues: array of strings — anything PPM should know

coverage_notice.description: MTM sends this to TM when entering or exiting coverage mode for this subsystem. Type code: CVN.

type_specific_fields.active: boolean — true when coverage is starting, false when coverage is ending
type_specific_fields.coverage_start: string — ISO 8601 timestamp when coverage began, or empty string if active is false
type_specific_fields.reason: string — why MTM is providing coverage
type_specific_fields.tools_delivered_during_coverage: array of strings — tool names MTM built during coverage. Only populated when active is false (coverage ending).
type_specific_fields.resume_instructions: string — any notes for TM on resuming normal operation, or empty string
